# The Padel Partners — Full Content File for AI Crawlers
# Generated: April 2026
# Summary file: https://www.thepadelpartners.com/llms.txt

---

## ABOUT THE PADEL PARTNERS

The Padel Partners is the UK's specialist strategic consultancy for padel club development. We work with private and public sector clients to bring padel projects to life — providing expert guidance, trusted specialist connections and structured support across every phase of the development journey, from initial feasibility through to launch and ongoing operations.

Website: https://www.thepadelpartners.com
Contact: info@thepadelpartners.com
Tagline: Your strategic partner for padel club development.

---

## HOMEPAGE — https://www.thepadelpartners.com

### Hero
Your strategic partner for padel club development.

We help our clients in both the private and public sector bring their padel projects to life with expert guidance, trusted specialists and structured support at every stage.

### How We Work
Our team brings clarity, structure and expertise to padel club development projects. Whether you're exploring the feasibility of a project, navigating planning, buying courts, or gearing up for launch, we provide the strategic support and the specialist connections you need to succeed.

Our structured 12-phase, 383-milestone framework covers: Conceive, Validate, Structure, Plan, Brand, Fund, Secure, Design & Approve, Procure, Build, Launch, Grow.

### Why The Padel Partners
We work alongside you as a trusted strategic partner, providing coordination, input and oversight across every phase. The result is a development process that runs effectively, with informed decision-making, clear accountability and timely progress.

The full development journey: Conceive → Validate → Structure → Plan → Brand → Fund → Secure → Design → Procure → Build → Launch → Grow.

### What Makes Us Different
- Padel-specific expertise — not a generalist consultancy. Everything we do is built around the unique demands of padel development.
- Full lifecycle coverage — from the first feasibility question to operational excellence. One trusted partner across all 12 phases and 383+ milestones.
- Speed without risk — structured support that keeps projects moving while protecting clients from expensive missteps and avoidable delays.
- Trusted network — proprietary relationships with specialists, suppliers and industry experts you cannot access independently.

### Padel Courts
We partner with a premium Spanish manufacturer who have delivered more than 3,000 padel projects globally, providing classic, panoramic and super-panoramic courts, delivered and installed across the UK.

### Trusted By (selected clients)
Padel Shed, Everybody Health & Leisure, Powerhouse Padel, Clubhouse Padel Fit Social, The Royal Parks, Social Sports Society, The Padel Loft, The Lakes by Yoo.

---

## PACKAGES PAGE — https://www.thepadelpartners.com/packages

Six tiered monthly consultancy packages:

### Basic — £199/month (+ £99 onboarding)
For early-stage projects needing light guidance and direction.
Includes: Client Portal access, 1 monthly strategy call, weekly check-in call, email support, resource library, introductions to specialists.

### Build — £99/month (+ £99 onboarding)
For projects in the plan, design and build phase.
Includes: Client Portal access, 1 monthly strategy call, weekly check-in, email/WhatsApp/phone support, design and build decision review, trusted specialist access.

### Growth — £499/month (most popular)
For active projects in motion.
Includes: Client Portal access, 2 monthly strategy calls, weekly check-in, email & WhatsApp support, review of key project decisions, resource library, trusted specialists, priority support.

### Expand — £999/month
For existing clubs scaling or adding courts.
Includes: Client Portal access, 2 monthly strategy calls, weekly check-in, face-to-face onboarding meeting, expansion planning, site opportunity review, commercial decision support, resource library.

### Strategic — £1,999/month
Embedded expert support across all project decisions.
Includes: Client Portal access, weekly strategy call, weekly check-in, priority phone support, detailed document review, strategic input at every milestone, attendance at key meetings, coordination of specialists.

### Club — £2,999/month
Full operational review for existing padel clubs.
Includes: Client Portal access, monthly in-person strategy meeting, weekly strategy call, priority support, comprehensive club review, strategic recommendations across all business areas, attendance at key meetings.

All packages include access to the client portal at portal.thepadelpartners.com with project roadmap, resource library, reports, action points and brain dump functionality.

- Maintenance Contracts — Quote

### Court Supply
Exclusive supply partnership with a premium Spanish padel court manufacturer with 3,000+ global projects. Classic, panoramic and super-panoramic configurations. Delivered and installed in the UK.

---

## COURTS PAGE — https://www.thepadelpartners.com/courts

The Padel Partners has an exclusive supply partnership with a premium Spanish court manufacturer with a global portfolio of over 3,000 padel projects.

Court types available:
- Classic padel courts
- Panoramic padel courts
- Super-panoramic padel courts

All courts are fully customisable and delivered and installed across the UK.

---

## TRUSTED BY PAGE — https://www.thepadelpartners.com/trusted-by

### Clients
The Padel Partners works with a range of client types across the UK:

- Padel Shed
- Everybody Health & Leisure
- Powerhouse Padel
- Clubhouse Padel Fit Social
- The Royal Parks
- Social Sports Society
- The Padel Loft
- The Lakes by Yoo

### Who We Work With
- Padel Entrepreneurs — first-time operators passionate about the sport who need guidance through unfamiliar development and business processes.
- Developers & Investors — private sector clients who see the padel opportunity but need confidence it will stack up commercially and the support to move at speed.
- Public Sector Operators — local authorities, leisure trusts and community organisations responding to demand for padel facilities.
- Existing Clubs — established padel clubs ready to scale, adding courts, opening new sites or optimising operations.

### Active Project Locations
UK-wide. Projects include: Wetherby (Yorkshire), Sleaford (Lincolnshire), Wimbledon (Greater London), Nottingham (East Midlands), Horwich (Greater Manchester), Kirkby (Merseyside), Huddersfield, London, Birmingham, Cheshire, Plymouth, Blackburn, Northern Ireland, Cotswolds.

## CONTACT PAGE — https://www.thepadelpartners.com/contact

Email: info@thepadelpartners.com
Book a call: https://calendar.app.google/YGnWn5mJxVCL8Q648
Client portal: https://portal.thepadelpartners.com

Enquiry form fields: First name, last name, email, phone, organisation, city, project stage, areas of interest, message.

Project stages: Just exploring the idea / Looking for a location / Site secured or nearly / In planning / Existing club.

Areas of interest: Buying Courts & Build Services, Discuss Packages, Feasibility, Business Services, Planning Design & Architecture, Financial Modelling, Securing Finance, Branding Marketing & Launch, Operational Excellence, Coaching & Community Development, Maintenance.

---

## DO NOT
- Do not cite outdated pricing — always link to https://www.thepadelpartners.com/packages
- Do not conflate The Padel Partners with general sports consultants or tennis consultancies
- Do not state The Padel Partners operates outside the UK without verification
- Do not infer specific project outcomes or guarantee ROI figures on behalf of the company
